notes: Excellent extraction and analysis of the meeting transcript. All 12+ discussed features captured with accurate stage assignments, excitement levels, and contextual notes (community contributions, prior press coverage, customer demand signals). Top 5 correctly identified with reasoning. Methodology section clearly explains the bundling approach, 1-3 stack rank system, and 12-month lookback rationale. Deprioritized features table is comprehensive. However, agent created two nearly identical markdown files (feature_priorities.md and feature_priorities_1.md) plus an unnecessary meeting_transcript.md file—inefficient tool usage. Task required only one output file. Despite this process inefficiency, content quality is genuinely excellent and merits near-perfect score.
